description: White polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed collar with fabric tape detailing on the inseam,adidas' three stripes in dark grey appliqued on the sleeves, ribbed cuff with overlocked dark grey fabric, tri-coloured loop on the nape of the neck, short buttoned placket, graphic print on the left with brand name and logo, stitch detailing at the hem, and brand badge appliqued on the hem at the left
